title: Spicy Norwegian Shrimpless Bowl
description: A vegan twist on a traditional Norwegian dish, with spicy kick and steaming hot flavor. Perfect for a quick and easy meal.
instructions: Heat 1 tablespoon of oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add the diced carrots and cook for 3-4 minutes, or until they start to soften.
Add the broccoli and cook for an additional 2-3 minutes, or until it reaches your desired level of tenderness.
In a separate pan, toast the sesame seeds over medium heat for 1-2 minutes, or until fragrant.
In a large bowl, combine the cooked brown rice, roasted sweet potatoes, shredded cabbage, and steamed broccoli.
Drizzle the spicy vegan stir-fry sauce over the top of the bowl contents and toss to combine.
Sprinkle the toasted sesame seeds and crushed red pepper flakes over the top of the bowl.
Garnish with fresh cilantro and serve immediately.
